one_time_description: Government of Canada - Class Action Settlement of $500,000 received in 2023; prior year included Treaty Salaries Settlement of $3,044,558
economic_notes: Nation operates a meat shop (retail sales $97,443). Has investments in Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd., and Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings Limited Partnership. Purchased land in Lloydminster, Saskatchewan financed by RBC term loan. Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada ongoing. Nation is a member of Border Tribal Council and Federation of Sovereign Indigenous Nations.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to insufficient audit evidence regarding accuracy, occurrence and classification of expenses. Budget was not prepared on a timely basis nor approved by Council, and did not include all components of operations. Five entities consolidated: Poundmaker Cree Nation, Poundmaker Cree Nation CMHC Housing, Poundmaker Royalty Corporation, Poundmaker Treaty Land Entitlement Trust, and West Arrow Development Corporation. Three GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Poundmaker Economic Development Holdings Limited Partnership, Kanatinak Store 2 Inc., and 101119042 Saskatchewan Ltd. Poundmaker Legacy Trust excluded from consolidation as Chief and Council do not control it. Treaty Benefits Claim against Government of Canada ongoing - Nation obtained $350,000 loan from legal counsel to fund negotiations. $4,600,000 term loan from RBC subject to refinancing for land purchase in Lloydminster. Prior year figures restated per Note 25. Financial statements dated December 20, 2023. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $17,490,712 + CMHC $541,894 + Government of Canada Class Action Settlement $500,000 + Government of Canada other $285,019 = $18,817,625. OSR = $21,152,168 - $18,817,625 = $2,334,543.
